scripts.build:server: esbuild ./server/src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node24 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __createRequire } from 'node:module';import { dirname as __pathDirname } from 'node:path';import { fileURLToPath as __fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);const __filename = __fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);const __dirname = __pathDirname(__filename);" --outfile=./server/dist/main.js && node ./scripts/copy-tutti-package-assets.mjs server
